question: Chapters
feedback: The text lists four main sections of the thesis: Lieli valodas modeļi un to izmantošana noskaņojuma analīzē, atsauksmju datu kopa, piemērots LLM veikšana, praktiskais pielietojums. However, it would be clearer if the sections were numbered or clearly separated.

question: Description
feedback: The text briefly describes the contents of each section. It mentions what will be covered in each part, such as the study of large language models and their application in noise analysis.

question: Structure
feedback: The general structure of the thesis can be understood from this text. It outlines a clear progression from theoretical background to practical application, with a focus on data selection and model implementation.
